title: senecio hesperidum
intro: Senecio hesperidum, also known as Lemon Senecio or Tresco Senecio, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is native to the Canary Islands and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestive issues, and even exhibiting antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of Senecio hesperidum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
